catalog_target.description: Defines the Glue Catalog target configuration, specifying the database and table to be included for crawling.
catalog_target.type: list(object({connection_name: optional(string),database_name: string,dlq_event_queue_arn: optional(string),event_queue_arn: optional(string),tables: list(string)}))

classifiers.description: Defines the custom classifiers to use for data categorization, enabling the crawler to identify the format and structure of your data.

configuration.description: Specifies advanced JSON configuration options for the crawler, such as data lineage settings or custom classifiers.

database_name.description: Name of the Glue Data Catalog database to associate with the crawler; must already exist in the same AWS account and region.

delta_target.description: Specifies the Delta Lake data source configuration for the crawler, including database and table information.

description.description: Provides a detailed summary or metadata about the Glue crawler's purpose and functionality.

dynamodb_target.description: Specifies the DynamoDB table to crawl, including table name and optional scan rate.

hudi_target.description: Defines the target data source for the Glue crawler, specifically for Hudi datasets, which must be compatible with Hudi table formats.

iceberg_target.description: Defines the target Iceberg table location for the Glue crawler, specifying the data source to be crawled.

jdbc_target.description: Specifies the JDBC target configuration for the Glue crawler, including connection details and paths to crawl.

lake_formation_configuration.description: Defines the Lake Formation settings for the crawler, specifying data catalog permissions and integration options.

lineage_configuration.description: Defines the data lineage configuration for the Glue crawler, specifying whether lineage generation is enabled or disabled.

mongodb_target.description: Defines the MongoDB connection target for the AWS Glue crawler, including connection details and database settings.

name.description: Specifies the unique name for the Glue crawler, must be between 1 and 255 characters.

recrawl_policy.description: Defines the recrawl policy for the crawler, specifying how data sources are revisited to detect changes. Options include "CRAWL_EVERYTHING," "CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY," or "CRAWL_EVENT_MODE."

role.description: IAM role ARN that grants permissions for the Glue crawler to access data stores and resources.

s3_target.description: Specifies the S3 target configuration for the Glue crawler, including the S3 path and optional settings like exclusions. Must be a valid S3 URI.
s3_target.type: list(object({connection_name: optional(string),dlq_event_queue_arn: optional(string),event_queue_arn: optional(string),exclusions: optional(list(string)),path: string,sample_size: optional(number)}))

schedule.description: Defines the cron expression or predefined schedule for the crawler's run times. Must be in a valid cron or schedule expression format.

schema_change_policy.description: Defines the behavior for handling schema changes in the data source, including update and deletion policies.

security_configuration.description: Specifies the name of the security configuration to use for the crawler, ensuring data encryption and compliance requirements are met.

table_prefix.description: Defines a prefix for table names created by the Glue crawler; must be unique within the target database.

tags.description: Key-value pairs used to organize and categorize the Glue crawler, typically for cost tracking or other administrative purposes.
